description: Polyglot AppHost code generation (TypeScript, Python, Java, Go, Rust) now succeeds reliably when the Aspire CLI and AppHost SDK are built at different times. The fix freezes the strong-name AssemblyVersion of Aspire.TypeSystem at a stable baseline so the cross-ALC type identity contract is always satisfied regardless of version skew.
name: Fix polyglot codegen binding failure on CLI/SDK version skew
